THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLINTON, ISIAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 SIXTH STREET, ROOM #330; SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-16-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EVICTION THROUGH 10-15-96; 5PM. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES.
